title: An Invitation From Beyond
overview: Rinku receives an invitation to the “Legendary Fes.” that happens once every hundred years...

title: Happy Dance Hustle!
overview:
What are we lacking?

The answer that Happy Around!, or Rinku in particular came up with is...!

title: Peaky P-key's Double Strategy
overview:
Peaky P-key's popularity knows no limits.

Attention is good, but constant interviews deprive them of practice time.

Esora proposes a plan to resolve the situation!

title: Photon Maiden's Cosmic Color Diagnosis
overview:
Saki from Photon Maiden has synesthesia, and is able to see color in sound.

She analyzes the color of each member.

What color does she see in them...?

title: Hype! Merm4id Video Conference
overview:
Sup! It's Merm4id's first video conference!

Saori gathered the members to celebrate the success of their concert.

Can she hold them back from going too wild?

title: RONDO Nightmares
overview:
Nagisa has been having trouble with her dreams.

Hiiro explains that it's stress that is making her see nightmares.

If this continues, RONDO's performances may be at risk...?!

"Guys, please help me!!"

title: Lyrical Lily's Delightful Snack Time
overview: Lyrical Lily was elegantly having afternoon tea in the Arisugawa Academy gardens... when Kurumi brings in a heap of snacks?!

title: Road To Legend
overview:
"Wait, aren't we forgetting something?"

Happy Around! had completely forgotten to register for the Legendary Fes.

What do we do?!

title: Battles of Honor and Muscles: Deadly Fight in Nakano
overview:
What you need for DJing... muscles!

What you need for performances... muscles!

What you need to hype up the Fes.... muscles!

A fierce battle is about to begin...

title: Singing Voice Conference♡
overview:
"Let's discuss how we can improve our singing voice!"

The members Rinku called together brought with them items that helps their singing.

title: Spa Party
overview:
Muni Ohnaruto is guided by fate, and visits an unexplored land.

What awaits her at the end of her journey...?

title: Nyochio & Muni
overview:
"What can I do to be considered the cutest in this school?!"

To bring out the cuteness in Muni-chan!

A super producer rises up!

The name is... Nyochio!

title: Trials of Dreams
overview:
Hey! Hey! Hey! The U4 FES. preliminaries has begun!

Numerous trials are given to the chosen DJ units!

Can Rinku and her friends pass the preliminaries?!

title: Rei's Challenge
overview:
Maho is feeling inadequate again, "I think there's more we can do."

Rei proposes trying out new instruments.

HapiAra's new possibility opens up! Or maybe not...?

title: Solo Holiday
overview:
A good rest is essential for the best performance!

Kyoko sets out to town alone, without the other members.

Little did she know that Peaky miracles awaited her...

title: Photon Maiden's Galactic Tokyo Exploration
overview:
Producer Shano gives Photon Maiden a day off.

Towa proposes showing Saki around Tokyo.

The four's bonds deepen through the sightseeing...

title: Island Survival War
overview:
We were headed for a summer resort, but ended up on a deserted island!

Might as well enjoy it!

Merm4id is free-spirited even in the wilderness.

Can they get off the island safely?!

title: RONDO Love Song
overview:
RONDO visits a fancy bar to celebrate a successful concert.

Admiring the night view, the members start to talk about love...

title: Horror Girls: Final Destination... Terror
overview:
Lyrical Lily's next concert will take place in a church!

They work together to prepare, but are interfered by supernatural phenomena...!

title: Life or Death?! The Battlefield of D
overview: Rinku, traveler of the roadless road.

title: Lyrical Dream♪ Noa Noa Land
overview:
How's everyone doing? This is Noa Fukushima.

A cute world, by the cute, for the cute.

Come join me in this wonderful kingdom!

See you next time, on Lyrical Dream♪

title: She That Pranks Hiiro Pranks Herself
overview:
Kurumi Shiratori has a natural enemy. The name is Hiiro Yano.

To get her revenge, Kurumi plans out a strategy.

A decisive battle is about to begin...!

title: Sigh Over a Cup of Coffee
overview:
Café Vinyl provides delicious coffee and relief.

It seems there are several troubled guests today.

Please relax until your melancholy goes away...

title: Photo Diary Memories
overview:
Countless scenes framed in photographs.

Each one brings back precious memories.

What is your "best moment"?

title: For Whom the Disc Spins
overview:
U4FES. finals has begun!

The DJ units fight for honor and glory.

Which one of them will come out victorious...?!

title: Digglers Forever
overview:
Rinku continues to run towards the finish line.

For all her friends waiting for her there...
